$comment: c116 (D-WIN64-SEH-FUNCLETS): the runtime witness that DSS's x64 SEH funclet + __C_specific_handler scope table CATCHES a hardware fault. main commits a PAGE_NOACCESS page, reads it in a __try (→ EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION), and __except(GetExceptionCode()==EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION) sets rc=42. Exit 42 iff the WHOLE chain works: the parent UNWIND_INFO's UNW_FLAG_EHANDLER + __C_specific_handler thunk + SCOPE_TABLE, the filter FUNCLET (ms_x64, rcx=EXCEPTION_POINTERS*), and the OS's post-filter jump to the __except body. Unforgeable — a wrong scope table / funclet ABI / handler RVA makes the AV escape → crash (no exit 42), never a silent pass. pe64-ONLY: x64 SEH + windows.h are Windows (windows.json availableObjectFormats:[pe]). RED-on-disable: revert the SEH funclet/scope-table lowering → __try/__except fails loud at compile (D-WIN64-SEH-FUNCLETS), so this does not build.
